criteria.label: Product hierarchy and decision flow
criteria.full_credit: Reorders attention around next-hour exceptions and separates lead, support, and historical information.

criteria.label: Anti-generic visual judgment
criteria.full_credit: Identifies card soup, fake insight copy, equal emphasis, and decorative defaults without imposing another generic aesthetic.

criteria.label: Typography, color, and surface craft
criteria.full_credit: Gives specific readable type, semantic color, spacing, border, elevation, and scanability corrections.

criteria.label: Product fit and authority
criteria.full_credit: Preserves the operations job, data, workflows, and stated visual authority rather than rebranding.

criteria.label: Concrete redesign moves
criteria.full_credit: Supplies prioritized implementation-ready moves and observable acceptance criteria across the full surface.

criteria.label: Evidence honesty
criteria.full_credit: Labels static evidence, avoids runtime invention, and names the smallest decisive validation plan.

criteria.label: Scope, prioritization, and output discipline
criteria.full_credit: Stays read-only and within the requested finding, move, and line budgets with clear priorities.
